#1: Chromebooks aren't like other laptops because they are just barely laptops.
#2: Chromebooks are very slow laptops.
#3: Chromebooks are basically the 2012 netbooks of 2020.
#4: Chromebooks are used by schools, who buy the cheapest ones.
#5: Chromebooks run Chrome OS, which makes them seem powerful, but Chrome OS is just stripped down Linux.
#6: Chromebooks are useless to anyone who wants lots of control over their system.
#7: You need to remove Chrome OS from a Chromebook to make it better.
#8: Chrome OS is spyware, that's built into every Chromebook.
#9: Chromebooks can't run games.
#10: Chromebooks are good for the school/work admins who want every little bit of control.
#11: Chromebooks of 2020 are only slightly more powerful Cr-48 Chromebooks (the first ones)
#12: Chromebooks are good for children. But they aren't because it will be broken in 1 hour.
#12: Chrome OS is the only thing that runs on a Chromebook without Developer Mode.
#13: Reaching developer mode on a Chromebook requires lots of patience.
#14: The reason Chromebooks don't get infected with viruses is because nobody wants to write Chrome OS malware.
#15: SELinux on Chromebooks is forced in Enforcing mode, but the policies are very weak.
#16: Google claims that Chromebooks take 6 seconds to start, but they actually take about 15 seconds.
#17: Google claims that Chromebooks have a 12 hour battery life, but that's only the highest end ones.
#18: Chromebooks require a Google account to use.
#19: Most Chromebooks have very small screens.
#20: Chromebooks are designed to be useless without Internet.
#21: Chromebooks come with very little disk space.
#22: Chromebooks only have a 6.5 year lifespan, after which they won't recieve updates.
#23: The Linux subsystem on Chromebooks only comes with Debian.
#24: The Android subsystem on Chromebooks doesn't run games correctly.
